validation_rows.requirement: direct upstream P3-SPEC-LAYOUT review decision is approved and current
validation_rows.failure_mode: compiler starts from stale or unapproved layout authority

validation_rows.requirement: all previous P3 spec review decisions are bound by sha256 and subject hash
validation_rows.failure_mode: compiler input set cannot prove approved source, distillation, closure, element, pattern, and layout lineage

validation_rows.requirement: compiler input bundle contains only allowed input types with path, sha256, and approval linkage
validation_rows.failure_mode: unapproved candidate, local draft, manual final fragment, direct source semantic read, unhashed file, or invalidated evidence enters compiler

validation_rows.requirement: closed_input_hash matches the closed input records, source snapshot identity, stage order, and section order
validation_rows.failure_mode: input bundle was changed after closure or hash was copied from a different bundle

validation_rows.requirement: stage order is DRD-01, DRD-02, DRD-03, DRD-03B, DRD-04 and section order slots are explicit and unique
validation_rows.failure_mode: final DRD is order-dependent on nondeterministic or contradictory sources

validation_rows.requirement: each compiled section references known semantic_unit_ids and a semantic unit is not compiled into multiple sections
validation_rows.failure_mode: compiled prose cannot be reconciled with approved semantic unit inventory

validation_rows.requirement: atomic semantic unit inventory passes compiler atomicity rules
validation_rows.failure_mode: unit inventory is too coarse to prove omission, addition, or duplicate compilation

validation_rows.requirement: natural-language bodies are preserved as semantic authority and inventory remains index and validation skeleton only
validation_rows.evidence: semantic_authority_rule and final DRD conservation report
validation_rows.failure_mode: compiler rewrites approved prose or treats canonical_value as a substitute authority

validation_rows.requirement: semantic conservation has no added units, omitted units, hash drift, unapproved inputs, non-atomic units, ordering findings, or nondeterminism findings
validation_rows.failure_mode: compiled output is not semantically equal to approved input set

validation_rows.requirement: final manifest, table of contents, reference index, hash index, semantic inventory, conservation report, and FINAL_DRD text are mutually consistent
validation_rows.failure_mode: sidecar indexes cannot reproduce or validate the final DRD

validation_rows.requirement: read-only QA writes only allowed QA outputs and never mutates compiled artifacts
validation_rows.failure_mode: post-compile QA changes the compiled package or writes unauthorized files

validation_rows.requirement: candidate scope is limited to P3-SPEC-COMPILER candidate files and does not create locks or implementation files
validation_rows.failure_mode: spec candidate mutates repository code, prior approved candidates, root P3 files, P1/P2 files, or control locks

minimum_test_obligations: candidate-check for P3-SPEC-COMPILER returns PASS with zero findings
candidate-check with P3-SPEC-LAYOUT REVIEW_DECISION returns PASS
candidate-check for all prior P3 review decisions returns PASS
artifact contract schema-bound minimum_fields match current compiler schema required fields
compiler artifact envelope fields are declared for every structured artifact
P3-required compiler fields include semantic_content_hash, sections, semantic_units, current_hashes, prose_authority_refs, and explicit output hash bindings
compiler rules reject forbidden input types and direct source semantic reads outside the closed bundle
compiler rules reject semantic additions, omissions, hash drift, unapproved inputs, non-atomic units, nondeterministic ordering, and QA mutation
scope report actual writes exist and forbidden write violations are empty
